MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Avalon Ocean Avenue LP is present, represented by James Ackvarelli.
Attorney Stephen Gorman for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cody Pahalad is present.
Attorney Raquel Fox appearing for defendant in limited scope.

Settlement discussions held with a Judge Pro Tem Dawn Payne.
The litigants and counsel hold settlement discussions with Judge Pro Tem. This case does NOT settle. The trial date of Sep-03-2024 remains on calendar.
